name: Redis 中间件基线 (CIS + 等保 2.0)

rules.title: 强口令 requirepass
rules.description: Redis 默认无密码, 必须设强密码

fix.command: F=/etc/redis/redis.conf; [ -f "$F" ] || F=/etc/redis.conf; [ -f "$F" ] || { echo "redis.conf not found"; exit 1; }; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; if grep -Eq '^requirepass\s+.{12,}' "$F"; then exit 0; fi; PW=$(LC_ALL=C tr -dc 'A-Za-z0-9' </dev/urandom | head -c 32); if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*#?[[:space:]]*requirepass' "$F"; then sed -i -E "s|^[[:space:]]*#?[[:space:]]*requirepass.*|requirepass $PW|" "$F"; else printf 'requirepass %s\n' "$PW" >> "$F"; fi; if ! grep -Eq '^requirepass\s+.{12,}' "$F"; then mv "$F.mxbak" "$F"; echo "verify failed, rolled back"; exit 1; fi; umask 077; printf '%s\n' "$PW" > /etc/redis/.mxcwpp_requirepass 2>/dev/null; chmod 600 /etc/redis/.mxcwpp_requirepass 2>/dev/null; echo "requirepass 已设置(口令存于 /etc/redis/.mxcwpp_requirepass, 仅root可读)"

rules.title: bind 127.0.0.1 (或内网 IP)
rules.description: 默认 0.0.0.0 暴露公网严重风险

fix.command: F=/etc/redis/redis.conf; [ -f "$F" ] || F=/etc/redis.conf; [ -f "$F" ] || { echo "redis.conf not found"; exit 1; }; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*#?[[:space:]]*bind' "$F"; then sed -i -E 's|^[[:space:]]*#?[[:space:]]*bind.*|bind 127.0.0.1 -::1|' "$F"; else printf 'bind 127.0.0.1 -::1\n' >> "$F"; fi; if grep -Eq '^bind\s+0\.0\.0\.0' "$F"; then mv "$F.mxbak" "$F"; echo "verify failed, rolled back"; exit 1; fi

rules.title: protected-mode on
rules.description: 默认 yes, 防未授权访问

fix.command: F=/etc/redis/redis.conf; [ -f "$F" ] || F=/etc/redis.conf; [ -f "$F" ] || { echo "redis.conf not found"; exit 1; }; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*#?[[:space:]]*protected-mode' "$F"; then sed -i -E 's|^[[:space:]]*#?[[:space:]]*protected-mode.*|protected-mode yes|' "$F"; else printf 'protected-mode yes\n' >> "$F"; fi; if ! grep -Eq '^protected-mode\s+yes' "$F"; then mv "$F.mxbak" "$F"; echo "verify failed, rolled back"; exit 1; fi

fix.suggestion: systemd User=redis: 确认 /var/lib/redis 等数据目录归属 redis:redis, 在 service 单元设置 User=redis Group=redis 后 systemctl daemon-reload && systemctl restart redis (改运行用户涉及数据目录属主, 需人工核对避免启动失败)

rules.title: 禁用 FLUSHDB/FLUSHALL/CONFIG
rules.description: 防误删 + 防 config rewrite 攻击

fix.command: F=/etc/redis/redis.conf; [ -f "$F" ] || F=/etc/redis.conf; [ -f "$F" ] || { echo "redis.conf not found"; exit 1; }; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; for C in FLUSHDB FLUSHALL CONFIG; do if ! grep -Eq "^rename-command\s+$C\s+\"\"" "$F"; then printf 'rename-command %s ""\n' "$C" >> "$F"; fi; done; for C in FLUSHDB FLUSHALL CONFIG; do if ! grep -Eq "rename-command\s+$C\s+\"\"" "$F"; then mv "$F.mxbak" "$F"; echo "verify failed, rolled back"; exit 1; fi; done

rules.title: 禁用 EVAL Lua 沙箱逃逸

fix.command: F=/etc/redis/redis.conf; [ -f "$F" ] || F=/etc/redis.conf; [ -f "$F" ] || { echo "redis.conf not found"; exit 1; }; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; if grep -Eq 'rename-command\s+EVAL\s+""' "$F"; then exit 0; fi; printf 'rename-command EVAL ""\n' >> "$F"; if ! grep -Eq 'rename-command\s+EVAL\s+""' "$F"; then mv "$F.mxbak" "$F"; echo "verify failed, rolled back"; exit 1; fi
fix.suggestion: 如不用 Lua 脚本: rename-command EVAL ""

fix.command: F=/etc/redis/redis.conf; [ -f "$F" ] || F=/etc/redis.conf; [ -f "$F" ] || { echo "redis.conf not found"; exit 1; }; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; if grep -Eq '^appendonly\s+yes' "$F" || grep -Eq '^save\s+[0-9]+\s+[0-9]+' "$F"; then exit 0; fi; if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*#?[[:space:]]*appendonly' "$F"; then sed -i -E 's|^[[:space:]]*#?[[:space:]]*appendonly.*|appendonly yes|' "$F"; else printf 'appendonly yes\n' >> "$F"; fi; if ! grep -Eq '^appendonly\s+yes' "$F"; then mv "$F.mxbak" "$F"; echo "verify failed, rolled back"; exit 1; fi
fix.suggestion: appendonly yes 或 save 配置

rules.title: TLS 加密通信 (Redis 6+)
rules.description: 防中间人 + 等保要求

fix.suggestion: Redis 6+ 启用 TLS: 先签发 CA/服务端证书私钥, 在 redis.conf 设置 tls-port 6379 + tls-cert-file/tls-key-file/tls-ca-cert-file 并将 port 设 0, 客户端同步改用 --tls (需准备证书, 不可自动签发)

fix.command: F=/etc/redis/redis.conf; [ -f "$F" ] || F=/etc/redis.conf; [ -f "$F" ] || { echo "redis.conf not found"; exit 1; }; chmod 640 "$F"; if id redis >/dev/null 2>&1; then chown redis:redis "$F"; fi

rules.title: Redis 6+ ACL 用户配置
rules.description: 默认 default 用户, 推荐细粒度 ACL

fix.suggestion: user app +get +set ~app:* >password: 需按业务确定 ACL 用户名/权限/键空间/口令, 写入 aclfile 或 redis.conf 后重载 (权限模型与口令需人工设计, 不可自动生成)
